name: Brim, Jefferson
evidence: Jefferson K. 'Jay' Brim III, 40+ year Austin attorney at Brim, Robinett & Brim, P.C. handling employment, education, professional-licensure and whistleblower litigation. Firm office at 2525 Wallingwood Dr, Austin 78746 matches the donor's 78746 zip.

name: Cummins, Clemmie
evidence: Distinctive name resolves to Clemmie Cummins, Wellness Consultant for the City of Austin (austintexas.gov email), holding BA/JD/MPH; previously wellness role at Austin Convention & Visitors Bureau. Consistent with an affluent central-Austin 78703 resident and committed Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0, 19 gifts). Zip not independently confirmed.

name: Century, Jane
evidence: Name + city resolve to Jane F. Century of Philadelphia (Mount Airy, 19119), a writer and artist (Bryn Mawr College; associated with the family firm Penn-Century, Inc., a research aerosol-device maker). Out-of-state donor to a Travis County commissioner (Shea), likely a personal/issue connection; occupation is creative/self-employed rather than a clear taxonomy industry.

name: Holderness, Mary (Mrs.)
evidence: Could not confirm a specific individual. 'Mrs.' and the 78746 (Westlake) zip suggest an older, affluent married West Austin resident giving to Shea (2016-2022), but no occupation, employer, or corroborating public record was found. Not classified.

name: Tyson, Paulette
evidence: Public-records address (801 Kingston Lacy Blvd, Pflugerville 78660) confirms a Paulette Tyson at the donor's zip, giving to Precinct-1 commissioner Travillion. Occupation unresolved: two conflicting LinkedIn profiles exist (Executive Assistant at Ronney Stevens Studios; Administrative Assistant at Lockheed Martin Aeronautics) and neither could be tied to this specific person. The Lockheed Martin admin-assistant match is unverified and, being clerical rather than exec/board/owner, would not meet the military-defense affiliation bar even if confirmed. Not classified.

name: McNeill, Lynn
resolved_employer: SAM (Surveying and Mapping, LLC) — now Director of Finance, Pirkey Barber PLLC
evidence: Lynn McNeill, CPA and finance executive in Austin (78704). County record lists occupation 'Finance' / employer 'SAM LLC' = Surveying And Mapping, LLC, where she was Director of Financial Planning & Analysis / Corporate Controller (2015-2023); now Director of Finance at law firm Pirkey Barber PLLC. Occupation and employer string both corroborate.

name: The Williams Law Firm
resolved_employer: The Williams Law Firm (Sidney C. Williams, attorney)
evidence: Full-service Austin law firm (criminal defense, personal injury, estate planning, small-business) led by attorney Sidney C. Williams. Firm address 1508 Dessau Ridge Ln Ste 503, Austin 78754 matches the donor zip; donated to Precinct-1 commissioner Travillion.

name: Cunningham, Ben
evidence: Best match is Ben J. Cunningham, an Austin-based mediator, arbitrator and settlement counsel (J.D. South Texas College of Law, licensed since 1988; co-founder of Lakeside Mediation Center). NOTE: this is NOT the anti-tax activist 'Ben Cunningham,' who is the Nashville/Tennessee Tax Revolt figure. He is a Vietnam veteran (US Army 1968-71) — military service, not a defense-industry affiliation. Zip 78745 not independently confirmed.

name: GI Screen Printing
resolved_employer: GI Screen Printing (custom apparel / screen & sublimation printing shop)
evidence: Small Austin (78760) custom screen-printing / t-shirt / sublimation and sports-apparel print shop (giscreenprinting.com). Business identity is solid; the taxonomy has no manufacturing/printing category so 'Retail' (custom apparel) is the closest fit. Single 2023 gift to George Morales.

name: Schneider, Harold
evidence: Likely a retiree and prolific Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0, 77 gifts; 78763 is an Austin PO-box zip). Could not confirm a specific individual or former career among several same-named people, so no industry is assigned.

name: Rathgeber, Richard
resolved_employer: Rathgeber Investment Company / Southwest Constructors (real estate developer & philanthropist)
evidence: Edward Richard 'Dick' Rathgeber, longtime and prominent Austin real-estate developer and philanthropist (b. 1933). Developed Lost Creek, Avery Ranch, Headwaters at Barton Creek and other large Austin-area subdivisions; named Austin Chamber 'Austinite of the Year.' 78731 (NW Hills) matches. Gave to Travillion and Ann Howard.

name: Hutchison Ford, Janet
evidence: Could not confirm the specific person. A Janet Hutchison is listed at 2602 Cavileer Ave, Austin 78757 (matching the donor zip), but several same-named Austin women exist across unrelated fields (retired/self-employed real estate at Dover Realty; mental-health professional at Integral Care); the donor's hyphenated 'Hutchison Ford' married surname could not be tied to any one of them. Recent first-time county donor (2024) to Shea. Not classified.
